weapons.name: Staff of Change and Ritual Dagger

abilities.name: Mutative Aura
abilities.flavor: Those who strike a Tzaangor Shaman are oft reduced to bubbling pools of twisted flesh.
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 7+, until the start of your next turn, each time an unmodified hit roll for a combat attack made by the target is 1, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.

abilities.name: Destined Quarry
abilities.flavor: Skyfires often select a target to utterly obliterate and erase from the tapestry of fate.
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this phase by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly units that target that enemy unit for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Eldritch Raiders
abilities.flavor: Tzaangors plunge into enemy lands, desperately seeking the arcane trinkets and treasures they crave – as well as victims to be transformed in their own bird-like image.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for this unit’s attacks while it is wholly within enemy territory.

weapons.name: Staff of Change and Ritual Dagger

abilities.name: Mutative Aura
abilities.flavor: Those who strike a Tzaangor Shaman are oft reduced to bubbling pools of twisted flesh.
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 7+, until the start of your next turn, each time an unmodified hit roll for a combat attack made by the target is 1, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target after the FIGHT ability has been resolved.

abilities.name: Deliver On Fate
abilities.flavor: When on the back foot, the Enlightened use the knowledge they have of their enemy’s past battles to predict their movements, taking great satisfaction in running their destined prey to ground.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for this unit while you are the underdog .

abilities.name: Deliver On Fate
abilities.flavor: When on the back foot, the Enlightened use the knowledge they have of their enemy’s past battles to predict their movements, taking great satisfaction in running their destined prey to ground.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for this unit while you are the underdog .

abilities.name: Destined Quarry

abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this phase by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly units that target that enemy unit for the rest of the turn.

battleTraits.name: Fated Arrival
battleTraits.summary: Set up this unit wholly within friendly territory, within 1" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit wholly within friendly territory, within 1" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: Predict The Future
battleTraits.summary: You can look at up to 3 cards from the top of your battle tactic deck without adding them to your hand
battleTraits.effect: You can look at up to 3 cards from the top of your battle tactic deck without adding them to your hand. Then, in any order, return each card face down to either the top or the bottom of your battle tactic deck.
